summaries.theme_name: Poor Customer Support and Technical Issues
actionable_ideas: Improve customer support responsiveness and empathy, especially for long-time customers and those experiencing financial losses due to technical issues
Enhance transparency regarding fees, charges, and status changes (e.g., BSDA status) to avoid unexpected surprises for users
Prioritize the resolution of technical issues, such as exchange connectivity problems and OTP verification failures, to prevent financial losses and improve user trust

summaries.theme_name: App Performance, Bugs, and Trading Issues
